channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🌍 UN Warns World to Brace for El Niño Extreme Weather
item.description: The World Meteorological Organization says there is an 80% chance of El Niño forming by August, with extreme weather impacts including drought, heatwaves, and hurricanes expected to hit even harder this year.

item.title: 🇺🇸 White House Correspondents Dinner Rescheduled After Shooting Incident
item.description: President Trump will attend the rescheduled dinner on July 24 at the Waldorf Astoria, with significantly enhanced security measures after a gunman stormed the security checkpoint at the original April event.

item.title: 🇧🇷 US Proposes 25% Tariff to Punish Brazil Over Trade Practices
item.description: The US plans new 25% tariffs on Brazilian imports citing issues including deforestation and digital trade practices, as Brazil seeks stable fertilizer supply amid the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden Prepares Prisons for 13-Year-Old Gang Killers
item.description: Swedish authorities are adapting prison systems as gangs increasingly recruit teenagers, some as young as 11, to commit murders and bombings across the Nordic region.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Urges Brazil to Repel External Challenges as Ties Deepen
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi met Brazilian counterpart Mauro Vieira as Brazil seeks key stable fertilizer supply amid the US-Iran conflict and potential new US tariffs.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Denmark's Frederiksen to form minority government after coalition talks
item.description: Social Democratic leader Mette Frederiksen secures third term as prime minister, forming a center-left minority government after months of negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada requests 16-year renewal of USMCA trade agreement
item.description: Canada formally requests a 16-year extension of the North American free trade pact, calling for all three countries to renew the USMCA trade deal.

item.title: 🇬🇭 Ghana parliament passes sweeping anti-LGBTQ+ law with prison terms
item.description: Ghana's parliament approves bill criminalizing LGBTQ+ identification and advocacy, with sentences of 3-10 years. President Mahama says the bill will be scrutinized before approval.

item.title: 🇲🇿 Mozambique confirms five citizens killed in South Africa xenophobic attacks
item.description: Mozambique reports five nationals killed amid anti-immigrant violence in South Africa. South African police confirm two deaths in Mossel Bay as protests sweep the country.

item.title: 🇰🇪 Two shot dead in Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine center
item.description: Two people killed during demonstrations against US plans to build an Ebola quarantine facility for American citizens at Laikipia Air Base. Locals fear exposure to the virus.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 US-China Tech Truce Remains Fragile Amid Deep Differences
item.description: Secretary of State Rubio emphasizes continued dialogue with Beijing despite unresolved tensions over chip exports and technology restrictions.

item.title: 🔬 China Faces Growing Tech Wall as US Export Controls Tighten
item.description: Beijing struggles to advance semiconductor ambitions as Washington admits challenges enforcing AI export restrictions, while bipartisan lawmakers propose new biotech limits.

item.title: 🇧🇩 Bangladesh Foreign Minister Elected President of UN General Assembly
item.description: Khalilur Rahman was elected president of the 81st UN General Assembly session in a vote at UN Headquarters, with India and Russia expressing support for stronger cooperation.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇦🇺 China to Impose 55% Tariff on Australian Beef as Imports Exceed Quota
item.description: Chinese imports of Australian beef are about to surpass a safeguard quota Beijing introduced to protect domestic farmers, triggering the tariff increase.

item.title: 🇸🇴 Somalia Security Operations Kill 28 al-Shabaab Militants
item.description: Coordinated operations in Hiran and Middle Shabelle regions targeted gathering places of the terrorist group, continuing efforts against the Islamist insurgency.

item.title: 🧬🇺🇸🇨🇳 Biotech Emerging as New US-China Tech Battleground
item.description: China's biotech industry is rapidly moving up the value chain, prompting fears in Washington and calls for tighter controls in what analysts see as the next frontier of tech competition.

item.title: 🇸🇳 Senegal's New Government Strengthens President Against Sacked Prime Minister
item.description: President Bassirou Diomaye Faye formed a new government in defiance of his powerful sacked prime minister Ousmane Sonko, whose party pulled out, raising political tensions amid a debt crisis.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran Reviews US Proposal to Halt War as Trump Says Talks Continue
item.description: Iran is reviewing a proposed agreement with the US to halt their conflict but has not communicated with Washington for days, while Trump insists negotiations are ongoing. The war has reached a stalemate after three months.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Launches Massive Strike on Ukraine, Kremlin Warns of New Paradigm
item.description: Russia attacked Ukraine with hundreds of drones and missiles overnight, killing at least 22 people. The Kremlin declared the war had entered a "different paradigm" due to what it called Ukrainian "terrorist acts."

item.title: ☢️🇪🇺 US Discussing Expanding Nuclear Weapons Deployments in Europe
item.description: The US is considering deploying nuclear weapons in additional European NATO states, the Financial Times reported. The discussions come as NATO allies reassess defense posture amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Rubio Says No Sanctions Relief for Iran Without Nuclear Concessions
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio told Congress that the US has not offered Iran sanctions relief to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, insisting any relief would be contingent on Tehran giving up its nuclear program.

item.title: 🇱🇹🇺🇸 US Troop Presence in Lithuania Under Review as Baltic States Watch Closely
item.description: Lithuania defense minister said the future US troop presence is "under review," with Washington assuring new rotations but no clarity on timing or strength. The announcement comes amid broader questions about US commitment to European allies.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇮🇷 British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal
item.description: Lindsay and Craig Foreman, arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey, have lost their appeal against their prison sentences in Iran.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Patriot missile shortage creates window of vulnerability Russia is exploiting
item.description: A shortage of Patriot missiles has created a critical vulnerability that Russia is exploiting in Ukraine, as Kyiv asks Trump to send more missiles following deadly strikes.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU accused of creating ICE-style immigration enforcement system
item.description: European officials say a new law will improve migration management by allowing more deportations of undocumented people, drawing comparisons to US Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
